title: Strong Foundation
subtitle: Preparing for the next phase
description: As you complete the second trimester, your body continues to require steady nourishment. This is a key time to reinforce a strong dietary foundation with balanced, nutrient-rich meals to support the transition ahead.
what_to_expect: Stable appetite with increased nutritional demand
Occasional fatigue or need for rest
nutrition_focus: Maintain consistency in meal and snack timing
Support energy with protein, iron, and calcium-rich foods
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or irregular eating patterns
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: A strong and balanced diet now supports your body for the next stage.

diabetes.personalized_description: Consistent and balanced meals support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Consistency supports steady energy and stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Maintaining iron-rich nutrition supports energy and prepares your body for the coming weeks.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent nutrition helps build strength steadily.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and hydration support stable blood pressure and comfort.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: A consistent and balanced diet supports metabolic stability and energy.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, reinforcing a balanced and consistent diet helps maintain strength and stability before the next phase.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
Include protein, iron, and calcium-rich foods
Focus on balanced and nutrient-dense meals
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: A strong nutritional foundation supports your overall well-being.
